progress_summary: Gate for decoupling the deploy from the dead Linear roadmap pull. npm run deploy:staging was aborting because gen-roadmap.mjs couldn't reach Linear under OPCHAIN_REQUIRE_LINEAR=1 — but /changelog reads roadmap-static.ts now and roadmap.json/loadRoadmap() is consumed by nothing, so the gate was protecting dead data. Removed gen-roadmap from prebuild, stripped the LINEAR_API_KEY assertion + OPCHAIN_REQUIRE_LINEAR + abortMissing from scripts/deploy.mjs, updated CLAUDE.md. Config/docs-only — no site/worker compile targets touched, so prior astro check 0 / vitest 345 / build 35 still hold. node --check deploy.mjs OK, package.json valid JSON, no anti-patterns or secrets in the diff. PASS.
next_actions: Merge the deploy-decouple PR, then re-run npm run deploy:staging — it no longer needs Linear and won't abort if Linear is unreachable.

DEPLOY from main on a laptop with wrangler login: npm run deploy:staging -> eyeball staging.opchain.dev/changelog -> npm run deploy. Ships the Option C v2 changelog + the whole already-merged v1.4.3 Codex marketing backlog.
